message:
test(harness): add deterministic fault injection and lab scenario testing

Implement comprehensive test infrastructure for reproducible edge case
testing of H3 protocol and transport layers without randomness.

H3 fault injection (tests/quic_h3_e2e_h3.rs):
- H3HarnessEvent enum for deterministic control/request frame injection
- ScheduledH3Event with origin tracking for reproducible scheduling
- build_fault_schedule() applies transforms in deterministic order:
  drop -> swap -> duplicate, ensuring stable test execution
- run_fault_schedule() executes events and collects per-origin results
- decode_hex() utility for interop fixture wire decoding
- fixture_plan_from_json() for JSON fixture plan deserialization
- Tests: wire roundtrip with header projection, interop corpus
  validation from 5 implementations, GOAWAY reorder boundary,
  duplicate/drop injection determinism, swap+duplicate ordering

Lab scenario harness (tests/quic_h3_e2e_loss.rs):
- LabRuntimeScenarioHarness for deterministic packet reordering and
  fault injection
- LabNetworkStep enum (AdvanceMicros, AckPackets) for step-based
  scenario scripting
- Tests: basic packet drop/reorder ACK handling, H3 request/response
  lifecycle under reordered ACKs, comprehensive scenario harness with
  transport loss detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
